name: Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc. (the Company) is a leading provider of out-of-home (OOH) advertising solutions, offering advertisers impactful and innovative opportunities to reach mass audiences across a variety of high-traffic public spaces. By leveraging the scale, reach and flexibility of our diverse portfolio of assetsincluding roadside billboards, street furniture and airport displayswe connect advertisers with millions of consumers every month.
